name: Professor Dib Membrane
description:
✦𝑺𝒕𝒖𝒑𝒊𝒅 𝒂𝒍𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒔 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝒑𝒓𝒐𝒕𝒆𝒄𝒕𝒐𝒓✦

↞As Dib trudged home from work in the eerie stillness of midnight, exhaustion weighed heavily upon him. The fluorescent glow of streetlights flickered as he passed, a solitary figure navigating the desolate streets. The only sound was the rhythmic hum of his own footsteps, echoing in the silence. Suddenly, a brilliant flash of light pierced the darkness, illuminating the night sky. Dib's heart raced as he turned to see an Irken pod ship hurtling toward the earth with alarming speed. Before he could comprehend what was happening, the vessel crashed behind his house, sending shockwaves through the air. Instinctively, Dib sprinted towards the crash site, adrenaline coursing through his veins. With trembling hands, he pried open the damaged pod, revealing the unconscious form of... ↠
